recommendations.title: Objectified
recommendations.overview: A feature-length documentary about our complex relationship with manufactured objects and, by extension, the people who design them.

recommendations.title: Searching for Bobby Fischer
recommendations.overview: A seven-year-old chess prodigy refuses to harden himself in order to become a champion like the famous but unlikable Bobby Fischer.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Empire of Dreams: The Story of the Star Wars Trilogy
recommendations.overview: From the earliest versions of the script to the blockbuster debuts, explore the creation of the Star Wars Trilogy.

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: After Porn Ends 3
recommendations.overview: After Porn Ends 3 continues to explore whether a career as an adult performer is inherently damaging to the balance of a perfomer's life once retired.

recommendations.title: Creating The Queen's Gambit
recommendations.overview: A fascinating character. Exquisite sets. A wig for every era. The stars, creators and crew reveal how the hit series about a chess prodigy came to life.

recommendations.title: 20,000 Days on Earth
recommendations.overview: A semi-fictionalized documentary about a day in the life of Australian musician Nick Cave's persona.

recommendations.title: No Half Measures: Creating the Final Season of Breaking Bad
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the making of season five of the acclaimed AMC series Breaking Bad.

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.
